mapper.insert:
/* 피크 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_peak ( site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, peak_val, peak_timestamp, peak_date, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.peakVal}, #{entity.peakTimestamp}, #{entity.peakDate}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* 피크 수정 */ UPDATE tb_peak
std_timestamp = #{entity.stdTimestamp},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
peak_val = #{entity.peakVal},
peak_timestamp = #{entity.peakTimestamp},
peak_date = #{entity.peakDate},
mod_date = NOW()
WHERE peak_idx = #{entity.peakIdx}
mapper.select: /* 피크 상세조회 */ SELECT peak_idx, site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, peak_val, peak_timestamp, peak_date, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_peak WHERE peak_idx = #{peakIdx}

/* 피크 목록조회 */ SELECT peak_idx, site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, peak_val, peak_timestamp, peak_date, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_peak
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
/* 마지막 피크 상세조회 */ SELECT peak_idx, site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, peak_val, peak_timestamp, peak_date, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_peak WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
/* 피크 상세조회 */ SELECT peak_idx, site_id, std_timestamp, std_date, peak_val, peak_timestamp, peak_date, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_peak WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND std_timestamp = #{stdTimestamp}
